title: Personal information charter
body: "The LMEG is sponsored by 5 government departments Department for Education, the Department for Work and Pensions, the Home Office, the Department for Business and Trade, and HM Treasury.  The current chair of the LMEG is the Migration Advisory Group (MAC). Read the MAC personal information charter for information on your rights as an individual when using services provided by the Labour Migration Evidence Group (LMEG) and how the LMEG uses personal information provided to them.  "
